title: Encryption at rest
rule: All stateful services must use Google-managed or customer-managed encryption keys. Plaintext storage is prohibited.

title: Database network isolation
rule: Managed databases (Cloud SQL, AlloyDB, Memorystore) must disable public IPv4 and attach to a peered VPC.

title: Edge WAF required
rule: Internet-facing load balancers should attach a Cloud Armor policy with the baseline OWASP rule set.

title: Least-privilege service accounts
rule: Workloads run as dedicated service accounts. Primitive roles (owner/editor/viewer) are prohibited in Terraform plans.

title: Key rotation
rule: Service account keys older than 90 days must be rotated; prefer workload identity federation.
